doc_title: PoSE: EFFICIENT CONTEXT WINDOW EXTENSION OF LLMS VIA POSITIONAL SKIP-WISE TRAINING

rule_hits.summary: Acknowledges contributors and lists references cited in the paper, providing a comprehensive bibliography of related works and methodologies.
Discusses the limitations of LLMs due to pre-defined context window sizes and the challenges of extending them. Introduces PoSE as a solution that simulates long inputs within a...
Reviews related work on length extrapolation and context window extension, highlighting the differences between PoSE and other methods like RandPos and Full-length fine-tuning....
Details the experimental setups and results for evaluating PoSE on language modeling and passkey retrieval tasks. Demonstrates the effectiveness of PoSE in extending context win...
